title: InstanceSourceDetails
description: Details for creating an instance source

sourceType.description: The source type for the instance

imageId.description: The OCID of the image used to boot the instance

bootVolumeId.description: The OCID of the boot volume used to boot the instance

bootVolumeSizeInGBs.description: The size of the boot volume in GBs. Minimum value is 50 GB and maximum value is 32,768 GB (32 TB).

bootVolumeVpusPerGB.description: The number of volume performance units (VPUs) per GB for the boot volume. Values range from 10 to 120. The default is 10 (Balanced).
